creator: osa@FreeBSD.org
text:
I have found tons or new error messages after I unplug and plug in a video cable in my laptop:

Feb 25 15:16:57 x1c kernel: drmn0: [drm] *ERROR* Fault errors on pipe B: 0x00000800
